text.title: Trunk-Based Challenges & Diagnostics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the trunk-based-challenges methodology end-to-end.

step.name: gather-evidence
step.action: Pull CI logs, PR metadata, flag inventory. Compute p95 PR size, p95 CI time, p95 review time, trunk-break frequency.

step.name: ordered-checklist
step.action: Walk in order: (1) branch protection, (2) CI < 10 min, (3) flags exist, (4) PR < 200 lines, (5) review SLA < 4h. Stop at the first failing check.

step.name: name-the-fix
step.action: Recommend a single concrete fix tied to the check (e.g., 'parallelise pytest into 4 workers; expected p95 8 min').

step.name: write-report
step.action: Emit markdown report with: metrics table, ordered-checklist results, named fix, monitoring plan, re-evaluation date.
